Title: A Long Weekend on Lake George in the Adirondacks!
TermsAndConditions:
Note:  Not available from June 28, 2026 - September 14, 2026.
October 11 - 18, 2026.  
This home is available until April 30, 2027 based on the owners' availability.
EffTicketTitle: A Long Weekend on Lake George in the Adirondacks!
EffCatalogDescription: Enjoy a long weekend (Friday to Monday) this Fall, Winter or Spring in Silver Bay, on Lake George, New York. Just 3 1/2 hours away from lower Westchester, this Adirondack home offers cozy comfort.  It is situated on 180 feet of frontage on Lake George, has pristine views, a dock to swim from with sandy bottom.  The home has a fireplace, two bedrooms, each with a queen bed and two twin beds.  Each bedroom has its own bathroom.  The home also has a large family kitchen. Four complimentary tickets to the Wild Center in Tupper Lake are included! The Adirondacks' famous nature museum!

Title: The Bunker Hill Inn - Bed and Breakfast, Salem, NY Two-Night Stay for Two

EffCatalogDescription: Enjoy a two-night stay for two in this charming B&B in beautiful Salem, NY, in Washington County.  Includes full breakfast. Many folks have so very much enjoyed their stays!!!

Title: One-week, seven-night stay at La Mourrade in Provence, France, for up to 10 people.
TermsAndConditions:
This is a fabulous French getaway for up to ten people.  
1,000 Euros security deposit is required to be paid at least four weeks before the start of your booking.  This deposit will be
refunded within one week of your departure if there is no damage to property or house contents.  Details will be provided
on how to submit the deposit once the dates are confirmed.

The stay can be used within 24 months of date of purchase.  Bookings are essential and subject to availability.  Blackout
periods apply for the months of July, August, and mid-December to mid-January.  Provisions for longer stays can be
accommodated by mutual agreement.  Flights and transfers are not included.
EffTicketTitle: One-week, seven-night stay at La Mourrade in Provence, France, for up to 10 people.
EffCatalogDescription: This 18th century Provençal farmhouse  (where Edie, Harold and friends vacation each year!) is located between Cadenet and Lourmarin, nestled on a hillside in the Luberon, set in the middle of 17 acres of olive, almond, and pine trees, the property boasts stunning views of Mont St. Victoire (featured in Cezanne's paintings) and the Durance river valley dotted with orchards, sunflower fields, and vineyards.  This beautiful home offers 5 bedrooms, 5 bathrooms, many living spaces, a huge family kitchen. It also has a large pool and pool house!
